dep.name: fastapi
dep.purpose: HTTP API framework for the server adapter

dep.name: pydantic
dep.purpose: Data validation and serialization for API schemas

dep.name: mlx-audio
dep.purpose: MLX audio processing and TTS integration

dep.name: transformers
dep.purpose: Hugging Face model loading and tokenization

dep.name: httpx
dep.purpose: Async HTTP client for Telegram API calls

constraint.reason: Uses modern type hint syntax and dataclass features
Apple Silicon GPU acceleration for TTS inference
Server adapter depends on current FastAPI API surface

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit and contract checks for isolated logic

wave-level.focus: Adapter wiring and endpoint behavior tests without heavy inference

phase-level.focus: Full regression suite including architecture boundary checks

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer fakes and narrow stubs over broad monkey-patching. Use conftest fixtures for shared test infrastructure.

Observability.logger: Python logging with JSON-structured output via log_event()
Observability.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, bearer tokens, or raw audio payloads.

DeliveryShape.shape: Single-machine deployment with local model files. Docker Compose for containerized runs. Three independent processes: server, telegram bot, and CLI.
